_comment: Perf gate budgets (#4410, phase 3 of epic #4407). Raising these is an explicit, reviewable act — bump the numbers in a PR with a stated reason.

bundle._comment: index-*.js + __common-*.js raw byte size, measured right after `bash scripts/build.sh`. Baseline is the post-phase-2 (#4409) actual.

homepageRequestGraph._comment: Chunks the homepage (`/`) is allowed to request, verified against the current build. Two groups: (1) the core entry chunks, and (2) chunks the app deliberately warms via the post-interactive progressive idle-preload queue (App.js `preloadTasks`, issues #537/#708/#719/#753) or homepage widgets (Lick of the Day, Endorsement News). Adding a new chunk here must be an explicit, reviewed decision. Chunks conspicuously ABSENT here on purpose: albumArticles and top10Lists — the two multi-MB chunks issue #4407 removed from eager/preload homepage loading; if either reappears in this list, that's the regression this gate exists to catch.
